summary: Phase 21 - Full LawFlow End-to-End Testing. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: Core flows verified - login, OTP, dashboard, all tabs (Cases, Calendar, Clients, More), Add Case form, Add Client form, Profile, Settings, Bulk Reminders all working correctly. Minor issues: auth endpoint name mismatch (documented as send-otp but actual is request-otp), tab navigation missing testID attributes, OTP double-submit on auto-fill + button click.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404). Actual endpoint is POST /api/auth/request-otp. Documentation/review request says 'send-otp' but backend uses 'request-otp'.

Returns 400 on second call because OTP is single-use. App triggers two calls: auto-submit on 6 digits entered + manual Verify button click. Second call hits 400. Flow still works but causes 400 in browser console.

ui_bugs.issue: Skip button click in automated test does not navigate away from /intro. Module-level `_navigated` flag may be getting reset between navigation cycles causing infinite loop back to /intro. Works if you wait for the 5s auto-timer or if introShown is correctly set.

integration_issues.issue: OTP auto-submits when 6 digits are entered AND user can also click Verify button - causing two verify-otp API calls. Second call gets 400 (OTP already used). Should disable auto-submit or debounce, or disable button after first submit.

action_items: Fix OTP double-submit: When 6 digits entered, either disable auto-submit or prevent manual Verify button from sending another request. Currently causes 400 error in console.
Investigate Intro Skip navigation: The `_navigated` module-level variable may be getting reset. Consider using `useRef` or state instead of module-level variable to track navigation state.
Add testID attributes to tab bar navigation items (Dashboard, Cases, Calendar, Clients, More) for better testability.
Documentation fix: Backend auth endpoint is /api/auth/request-otp NOT /api/auth/send-otp - update any documentation or API client code.
critical_code_review_comments: intro.tsx uses module-level `_navigated` variable - this can cause issues on web where modules may persist or reset unexpectedly. Better to use useRef.
OTP screen: auto-submit on 6 digits + manual verify button can cause double API calls. Need to prevent this.
Tab layout (_layout.tsx) has no testID attributes on Tabs.Screen components - add tabBarButtonProps with testID.
verify-otp returns isNewUser: true with name: null, but dashboard still loads. The signup redirect flow may not be triggered correctly when user has existing data.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test advocate (9876543210) with pre-existing cases, clients, hearings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend all working correctly. Auth endpoint is /api/auth/request-otp (not send-otp). API responses are wrapped: {success: true, data: [...]}. Core flows work: intro→login→OTP→dashboard→all tabs. Issues: Skip button navigation, OTP double-submit, missing tab testIDs.

feature_verification.intro_screen_skip_btn: PARTIAL - Skip button visible with testID, but navigation may not work reliably in web preview due to module-level _navigated flag
feature_verification.login_screen: VERIFIED - Phone input and Send OTP button work correctly
feature_verification.otp_flow: VERIFIED - Enter 9876543210, Send OTP, enter 123456, verify → dashboard loads
feature_verification.dashboard: VERIFIED - Greeting (Good Morning), stats (6 Today, 5 This Week, 3 Active Cases), today's hearings visible
feature_verification.cases_tab: VERIFIED - List of cases with status filters, add new case button (+) present
feature_verification.clients_tab: VERIFIED - Client list with names, phones, add (+) button
feature_verification.calendar_tab: VERIFIED - March 2026 calendar with dots on dates having hearings
feature_verification.more_tab: VERIFIED - Profile info, Account section (My Profile, Settings), Firm & Sharing, Tools
feature_verification.add_new_case_form: VERIFIED - All fields: Case Number, Title, Case Type (dropdown with Civil default), Court Name, Court City, Dates
feature_verification.add_new_client_form: VERIFIED - Full Name, Phone, Email, Client Type (Individual/Corporate/NGO/Government), City, Notes
feature_verification.bulk_reminders: VERIFIED - Accessible at /bulk-reminders, shows 'No hearings tomorrow!' correctly
feature_verification.profile_screen: VERIFIED - Shows advocate name, enrollment, designation, bar council, years of exp.
feature_verification.settings_screen: VERIFIED - Dark Mode toggle, Notifications, Data (Export/Clear), Data Backup (Google Drive)
feature_verification.health_check: VERIFIED - GET /api/health returns {status: ok, database: connected}
feature_verification.auth_verify_otp: VERIFIED - POST /api/auth/verify-otp returns token on success
